# Repository Copilot Instructions

## Process compliance
- For every implementation interaction, append one entry in docs/context/cumulative-context.md.
- Each entry must include: what, how, why, files, and next.

## Code style
- Keep comments concise and informative.
- Document each function, method, and background process behavior.
- Prefer explicit errors and low-overhead patterns.

## Scope discipline
- Avoid unnecessary dependencies.
- Preserve lightweight native-first architecture.
